com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface IAssignmentRuleInfo

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AssignmentRuleInfo

    public interface IAssignmentRuleInfo
    Assignment rule description interface

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getApplicationExt()
      Gets an application with additional criteria for applying the rule
      UUID getAssignmentRuleId()
      Gets an assignment rule ID
      String getInfoBaseName()
      Gets the name of the infobase where the rule is used
      String getObjectType()
      Gets an assignment object ID
      int getPriority()
      Gets assignment rule priority
      int getRuleType()
      Gets an assignment rule 0 - do not distribute to this server 1 - same as no rule 2 - distribute to this server
      void setApplicationExt(String applicationExt)
      Sets an application with additional criteria for applying the rule
      void setInfoBaseName(String infoBaseName)
      Sets the name of the infobase where the rule is used
      void setObjectType(String objectType)
      Sets an assignment object ID
      void setPriority(int priority)
      Sets assignment rule priority
      void setRuleType(int ruleType)
      Sets an assignment rule 0 - do not distribute to this server 1 - same as no rule 2 - distribute to this server

    • Method Detail

      • getAssignmentRuleId

        UUID getAssignmentRuleId()
        Gets an assignment rule ID
        Returns:
        assignment rule ID

      • getObjectType

        String getObjectType()
        Gets an assignment object ID
        Returns:
        assignment object ID

      • setObjectType

        void setObjectType(String objectType)
        Sets an assignment object ID
        Parameters:
        objectType - assignment object ID

      • getInfoBaseName

        String getInfoBaseName()
        Gets the name of the infobase where the rule is used
        Returns:
        infobase name, the null value stands for all infobases in the cluster

      • setInfoBaseName

        void setInfoBaseName(String infoBaseName)
        Sets the name of the infobase where the rule is used
        Parameters:
        infoBaseName - infobase name, the null value stands for all infobases in the cluster

      • getRuleType

        int getRuleType()
        Gets an assignment rule
        • 0 - do not distribute to this server
        • 1 - same as no rule
        • 2 - distribute to this server
        Returns:
        assignment rule

      • setRuleType

        void setRuleType(int ruleType)
        Sets an assignment rule
        • 0 - do not distribute to this server
        • 1 - same as no rule
        • 2 - distribute to this server
        Parameters:
        ruleType - assignment rule

      • getApplicationExt

        String getApplicationExt()
        Gets an application with additional criteria for applying the rule
        Returns:
        application with additional criteria for applying the rule

      • setApplicationExt

        void setApplicationExt(String applicationExt)
        Sets an application with additional criteria for applying the rule
        Parameters:
        applicationExt - application with additional criteria for applying the rule

      • getPriority

        int getPriority()
        Gets assignment rule priority
        Returns:
        assignment rule priority

      • setPriority

        void setPriority(int priority)
        Sets assignment rule priority
        Parameters:
        priority - assignment rule priority
